title: Flaky Indian Flour Crumble
description: A floral, flaky meal-prep American dish featuring cheese and a tadka flavor profile, designed for those following the paleo diet.

ingredients.name: Tadka Spice Mix (Optional)
ingredients.notes: Including cumin, mustard seeds, and curry leaves

instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine Indian Flour, Coconut Oil, and Almond Butter until well mixed.
Add Greek Yogurt and Cheese (Paleo-Friendly) and mix until the mixture is crumbly yet cohesive.
Stir in Flax Seeds if using, then add Tadka Spice Mix if desired for a fragrant flavor.
Transfer mixture to an 8x8 inch baking dish lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 20 minutes or until golden brown and crispy.
